content: Security: Fix JWT secret (generate strong, fail-fast in prod, document rotation)
Security: Restrict CORS (env-driven, refuse * in prod)
Security: Gate test users by APP_ENV (no QA users in production)
Security: Add login rate limiting (sliding window per IP)
Database: Alembic migrations (drop create_all, initial baseline, startup upgrade)
Database: Backup strategy (pg_dump script + runbook + retention)
Database: Move DB outside app pod (env-driven, retry, document managed-DB migration)
Discovery: Register schedule_cron with APScheduler (startup + on-PATCH)
Discovery: Retry mechanism with exponential backoff (providers + LLM)
Discovery: Lineage tracking (source_run_id FK on businesses)
Discovery: Idempotency keys (Idempotency-Key header on run endpoints)
Discovery: Source health monitoring (rolling error rate + alert flag)
